name: workharness
description: Install and manage WorkHarness workflows in AI coding projects.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/create.mjs && node --check src/lib/project.mjs && node --check src/commands/init.mjs && node --check src/commands/upgrade.mjs && node --check src/commands/add.mjs && node --check src/commands/sync.mjs && node --check src/commands/doctor.mjs && node --check src/commands/dashboard.mjs && node --check packages/create-workharness/index.mjs && PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/private/tmp/workharness-pycache python3 -m py_compile templates/core/.workharness/bin/*.py templates/core/.workharness/skills/workharness-context-gather/scripts/*.py templates/core/.workharness/skills/workharness-evaluate/scripts/*.py
scripts.release:check: pnpm run prepublishOnly && pnpm run pack:create:dry
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run check && pnpm run pack:dry
